title: Maybe Im Wrong
wikitext:
[]: Maybe I'm Wrong [Q Speculation - SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Eva4Dummies » Sun Sep 06, 2009 7:06 am but, I think that they are going to try something similar to Asuka's battle in the sea, because they abandon the fortified city, which means moving the evas, and in the preview you could see the large ships, which could be used to take the evas, also when you see pirate Asuka in the preview there is nothing in the background which may suggest that they are on the ship when Asuka reappears, just like in NGE!! This is only a speculation but it would be really cool, wouldn't it?

[]:             Quote Post by sean_sean_sean_sean » Sun Sep 06, 2009 7:23 am ... because they abandon the fortified city

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Sep 06, 2009 7:47 am sean_sean_sean_sean wrote: Well, really, I would assume that it's only been abandoned by all the civilians.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Sep 06, 2009 10:41 am SaltyJoe wrote: I guess a lot of the "Tokyo-III as a bustling city" shots were partly in 2.0 to provide the necessary contrast for the "Tokyo-III as a bleak, abandoned wasteland" setting in 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun Sep 06, 2009 12:02 pm I would not be all that shocked if the people living there did get up and leave after that kinda battle. The people of NERV have to stay there though till the very end.

[]: Re: Maybe I'm Wrong [Q Speculation - SPOILERS]             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Sep 07, 2009 1:03 am Eva4Dummies wrote: but, I think that they are going to try something similar to Asuka's battle in the sea, because they abandon the fortified city, which means moving the evas, and in the preview you could see the large ships, which could be used to take the evas, also when you see pirate Asuka in the preview there is nothing in the background which may suggest that they are on the ship when Asuka reappears, just like in NGE!! This is only a speculation but it would be really cool, wouldn't it?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Mon Sep 07, 2009 1:57 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: And hell, maybe it'd be an indication of Rebuild having an actual happy ending instead of what we get with EoTV/EoE where it's either happy but unresolved or just bittersweet. But who knows.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Sep 07, 2009 1:51 pm Did anyone else thing this thread was going to be about speculation that Mari was a Star Trek-style Q?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Mon Sep 07, 2009 1:54 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Did anyone else thing this thread was going to be about speculation that Mari was a Star Trek-style Q?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Sep 07, 2009 6:22 pm Well, it would make a lot of sense of the Q and the FAR were the same race.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Sep 07, 2009 7:39 pm Wait I thought Q was the third movie...(explodes)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Sep 08, 2009 1:41 am wonderluster wrote: Wait I thought Q was the third movie...(explodes)

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Tue Sep 08, 2009 9:21 am I thought the Thread was about Q

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Tue Sep 08, 2009 4:04 pm I give up (proceeds to another explosion)
